notes: comment.rs: 'Invalid File Name'/'Review Comment' are UI fallback titles for review comment cards -> translated. execute.rs:195 'Type is correct.' is .expect() -> panic_message. read_files.rs: 'Failed to read files: {failed}' and remote-session tool error are user/agent-facing error strings -> translated. secret_redaction.rs:550 .expect -> panic. code_block.rs: 'Add as Context'/'Run in terminal' are render_button labels -> translated. connected_self_hosted_workers.rs:96 report_error! context -> telemetry. local_child_harnesses.rs: returned disabled messages shown to user -> translated (Claude Code/Codex brand kept). registry.rs:33 'URL Protocol' is a Windows registry key name -> protocol_key. autoupdate/windows.rs:21 is a /// doc inside lazy_static! -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; line 236 sentry::capture_message -> telemetry. language_server_extension.rs:609 '{severity_text}: ' renders to UI FormattedText, placeholder is English severity word; translated colon to full-width and preserved trailing space. pr.rs: 'Open PR' toast link + 'PR successfully created.' toast -> translated. drive/settings.rs + accessibility + native_preference + ligature_settings: settings descriptions -> translated. command_dialog_view.rs:33 'Secret command' SECRET_SPAN UI label -> translated. model.rs:71 .expect Markdown regex -> panic (13 occurrences same string). model.rs:1414 a11y announcement -> translated. resource_center/mod.rs:118 '/changelog' is a slash-command identifier -> protocol_key. search_item.rs/ai_queries: accessibility_label & UI paragraph format strings -> translated (placeholders filled with names/durations preserved). billing_cycle_usage_team_totals.rs: '__card_*__' are internal card_key identifiers -> protocol_key. features_page.rs:3730 'seconds to complete' UI Text -> translated. add_regex_modal.rs:54 'e.g. "Google API Key"' editor placeholder example -> translated (Google brand kept); line 69 regex pattern placeholder -> protocol_key. bootstrap.rs:20/22 /// doc in lazy_static -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; line 318 .expect -> panic. message_bar.rs:80 .expect -> panic. data_source.rs: 'No skills found'/'Project Skill' UI text -> translated. terminal_model.rs:1369 report_error! -> telemetry. working_directory_config.rs: dropdown labels -> translated. event_loop.rs:181 .expect -> panic. footer.rs: 'Cloud agent starting up…'/'You'll be able to interact with Oz soon' footer UI -> translated (Agent/Oz kept, ellipsis preserved as fullwidth). link_detection.rs:77 'Open link' UI label -> translated; line 472 'Compute file paths' is a std::thread name -> telemetry. open_in_warp.rs: a11y content strings -> translated (Warp/Markdown kept, placeholder preserved). info_box.rs: 'Command edited.'/'Edit workflow'/'View Context' UI -> translated. header_toolbar_editor.rs:261 'Available items' section label -> translated; line 372 .expect -> panic. manager.rs: safe_anyhow!/safe_warn! safe+full fields are log/telemetry -> telemetry_payload. edit.rs:1421/1462 .expect -> panic. render/model/mod.rs: 933/2991/3001/3012/3021 all .expect -> panic. onboarding callout/model.rs: 'Run a command...' and the example agent prompt are user-facing onboarding suggestions -> translated (ellipsis fullwidth). warpui/examples/* (animated-gradient-text, percentage): demo example-app strings -> test_fixture (root_view.rs:28 is .expect -> panic). warpui_core new_scrollable: 'Axis is set to manual scrolling...'/'Size should exist' .expect -> panic.
